title: Big Boy Lightweight Body Filler, 250ml
features: Lightweight Easy Sanding General Purpose Filler
description: From the manufacturer Big Boy Lightweight Body Filler Universal Body Filler Easy Application Perfect exterior filler on areas requiring a paint finish E.G. Window frames, walls, etc. 250ml Available Silverhook Lightweight Body Filler offers easy application and excellent sanding properties. It is a two-component putty for application on large surfaces and is characterised by high elasticity and gripping Ability to a wide range of surfaces. Lightweight filler is talc-free and sands to a smooth finish. Silverhook Lightweight Body Filler will not clog up abrasive paper while sanding, it can also be used as a general-purpose filler on wood, metal, and rigid plastics. As the filler Is corrosion resistant It makes a perfect exterior filler on areas requiring a paint finish. Step 1 Ensure surface to be filled is free from grease and loose dirt. Brush off surface dust with damp cloth and leave to dry. Step 2 Mix the filler with hardener in the ratio supplied, (e.g. half tin of filler - half a tube of hardener) thoroughly to obtain a uniform colour. Step 3 Apply mixture immediately with firm pressure using spreader and build up to required level. Paste will start to harden within 5 minutes. Note: Hardening times will vary. Step 4 Leave to set for approximately 1 hour. Once dry surface can be sanded and wiped over.
